name: Architecture Review Contract
description: Analyze project architecture and produce improvement plans

scope.description: What to analyze — module, package, or full project

focus.description: Optional focus area: security, performance, maintainability

summary.description: High-level summary of the architecture review findings

findings.description: List of individual findings from the review

area.description: The area or component where the finding applies

priority.description: Priority level: critical, high, medium, low

recommendation.description: Suggested action to address the finding

exampleResponse.summary: The module structure is well-organized but has coupling issues between the service and persistence layers.

findings.finding: Direct database access from service classes bypasses the repository pattern
findings.recommendation: Introduce repository interfaces and route all data access through them

promptInstruction: Analyze the specified scope and produce structured findings with recommendations.
